review_text: I purchased a Spotify Premium subscription and enjoyed the Premium features for about a week. However, my account was unexpectedly switched back to the free plan without any explanation. I'm now being served ads before listening to music, even though I paid for Premium. This is very frustrating and disappointing. Customers should not lose access to paid features without clear communication or support.
discovery_reason: User expresses frustration over losing access to paid features.

evidence.discovery: User expresses frustration over losing access to paid features.
evidence.theme: losing access to paid features without explanation

evidence.barrier: unexpected switch back to free plan

review_text: The app continues to be glitchy, I can't open artists when I search them or it often tells me 'Spotify is offline' even when I have internet or data. The menu also frequently fails to pop up when I try to add a song to a playlist. And as far as suggested music goes, it often regurgitates back the same things I already listen to rather than finding new artists similar to what I like.
discovery_reason: User describes issues with discovering new artists due to app glitches.
